response.step_by_step_log: 1. Performed a visual scan of the video and identified two distinct musical segments: 00:00-02:04 ('Genesis' by hololive English -Advent-) and 02:05-05:01 ('id:entity voices' performed by Raora Panthera and Kobo Kanaeru). 2. Used the search tool to find the official lyrics for both songs. 3. For 'Genesis', used the query 'hololive English -Advent- Genesis lyrics'. 4. For 'id:entity voices', used the query 'id:entity voices lyrics Raora Panthera Kobo Kanaeru'. 5. Verified that the song 'id:entity voices' is the Japanese version, and the search results confirmed this with both Indonesian and Japanese lyrics. 6. Structured the final JSON with accurate timestamps, full lyrics (properly escaped), and required metadata.
response.global_summary: This video features two full live performances by Hololive production VTubers. The first performance is of the song 'Genesis' by the group hololive English -Advent-. The second performance is of the song 'id:entity voices' by Raora Panthera and Kobo Kanaeru.

scenes.description: A live performance of 'Genesis' by hololive English -Advent-. The performers are dancing and singing on a virtual stage with text 'Genesis' and 'hololive production' visible in the background.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Time to open up your eyes
Feel the music start to rise
Got to break the world and let me in
I know I was meant to be
Livin' life so fast and free
Try to keep your eyes on me
'Cause this is where my story all begins

Livin' it up like crazy
Ready to play? Come at me
Carried away so easy
I can't get enough
Free as a bird, no limit
Haven't you heard? I'm fearless
Get up and go, let's do this

Watch me, watch me, watch me
Watch me, watch me, watch me be your diva
I'm gonna raise your fever
Shakin' up all the crowd
Making some noise when I'm not allowed
Livin' my life out loud
I have awakened to wisdom beyond understanding
I keep indulging in my every whim (Let it out!)

(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Don't blame me if I shine too bright
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Can't help it if I start a fight
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Now pay attention, please
'Cause this is only the beginning
It's our Genesis
Coming to wreak some havoc
How do you like this plot twist?
I'm embracing my madness
(Can you hear it?)

Whispers banging down your window (Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Rumors reaching a crescendo (Ah-ha-ha)
No humble beginnings, I'm destined for great things
I'm sure you've heard of me by now, woah-oh
Midnight, draw me to the dark side (Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Daylight, take me on a joyride (Ah-ha-ha)
My crime is my passion, I'm mayhem in action
I know what day it is
This is our Genesis

(Ohh) Gonna start the rave
When I misbehave, take center stage
(Ohh) Let the fun commence
But you know I'm gonna get intense

There are loopholes unspoken, the rules can all be broken
I'm running on a rampage, the world is a blank page (Let's go)
I'm writing my story in flames and in glory
They're gonna know me by name

(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
Is this my promised land?
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
The future's in my hands
(Oh, o-oh, o-oh)
But they don't understand
That I'm a star in the making
Awaking and taking a bow-bow-bow-bow
Tell me, how you like me now?

Come and watch me, watch me, watch me, watch me
Let your worries go, gonna show you how to lose control, ready?
You've got to free your mind, leave your restraint behind
Be outrageous, the chaos is contagious
Come on, you know what time it is
It's our Genesis

Time to open up your eyes
Feel the music start to rise
Got to break the world and let me in
I know I was meant to be
Livin' life so fast and free
Try to keep your eyes on me
'Cause this is our beginning
It's our Genesis

Whispers banging down your window (Ahh; Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Rumors reaching a crescendo (Ah-ha-ha)
No humble beginnings, I'm destined for great things
I'm sure you've heard of me by now, woah-oh
Midnight, draw me to the dark side (Ahh; Oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Daylight, take me on a joyride (Ah-ha-ha)
My crime is my passion, I'm mayhem in action
I know what day it is
This is our Genesis

You know what time it is?
It's our Genesis
Tell me what time it is
It's our Genesis
Yeah, you know what time it is?
It's our Genesis
Tell me what time it is
It's our Genesis,

scenes.description: A live performance of 'id:entity voices' by Raora Panthera and Kobo Kanaeru. The stage lighting and background visuals feature the text 'id:entity voices'. The performers sing the Japanese version of the song while dancing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君に届けたい
id:entity
ステージに一歩を
踏み出した
おはよう! こんばんは! と
世界に
叫んでみよう
本日のライブでは
どれの自分を見せるの?
前からそう悩んで
好きな自分になれない
そしてある日
誰かに言われた
痛い言葉なんてに
迷っていた
いつも映る笑顔
失わないように
これ以上は
期待を
裏切らないと決めた
溢れている雑音の中で
この声響けるか?
心に宿る
声を聞いてみよう
これはずっと見せたい
自分だった
集まった声たちが
ひとつになる id:entity
日々が過ぎて
やっとスポットライトに
立てるけれど少しだけ
怖くなった
でもね! 一人じゃない
仲間たちがいるんだ
家族みたいな絆で
違いが分かり合えた
それぞれの輝きがあって
ハーモニー奏でるかな?
手をつないで
共に夢のその方へ
精一杯
歓声を上げよう

これからずっとこの

揺るがないと信じて
ひとつになる id:entity
selamat pagi semua!
お疲れ様でした!
selamat malam semua!

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I want to deliver to you
id:entity
One step on the stage
I took it
"Good morning! Good evening!" I shout
to the world
Let's scream
For today's live
Which part of me will I show?
I've been troubled by that for a long time
I can't be the self that I like
And then one day
Someone said to me
I was lost in the painful words
The smile that is always reflected
So I won't lose it
I decided not to betray
the expectations anymore
Among the overflowing noise
Can this voice resonate?
Let's listen to the voice
dwelling in my heart
This was the "me"
I wanted to show for a long time
The gathered voices
become one id:entity
The days go by
And finally I can stand
in the spotlight, but I got a little scared
But! I'm not alone
I have friends
With bonds like a family
We could understand our differences
Each of us has a glow
Will it play harmony?
Hand in hand
Together towards that dream
Let's give our best
to raise our cheers
I will deliver happiness
Resonate everywhere
Dive into a new stage
Now is the chance
Don't hesitate anymore
Here all the tones
Become the one true harmony
The restlessness of the heart
Is finally fading away
From now on, I will always
be just as I am
The gathered voices
Even if they are different
I believe they will never waver
And become one id:entity
Good morning! Good evening!
Nice work for today!
Good morning! Good evening!
Until the day we meet again,
